reviews.review_description: Overall the game was amazing and I loved it but I couldn't find the Quantum mass
MAKE A SECOND GAME PLS
PLZ MAKE IT MULTIPLAYER ME AND MY FRIEND OWN THE GAME AND WANT TO PLAY TO GETHER
Especially when you get your custom made drinks showing up. It feels crazy but also great relaxing therapy to just make stuff sometimes
Tried downloading it and it would not let me

I love the game but I got through objectives pretty fast and upgraded everything. I just wish there was a new update with possibly a story mode or more objectives to keep going. Freestyle is fun but I like objectives.
I have constantly had the glitch occur where it doesn't register the thumbs up and I have to exit the game and reboot it up which can be frustrating. Otherwise, it's good game!
A lot of the gameplay is repetitive and the same. I also found that the ending was disappointing and not worth the grind.
A multiplayer mode would be super fun however IвҖҷm sure itвҖҷs hard to make it multiplayer but it would be really fun to play with friends

I had a lot of fun with this game. All the ingredientswere really colorful and silly, and you have to memorize where each of them are. It was pretty neat when you start to remember drink recipes. I really liked the buying schematics and building my new equipment. Each new piece of equipment functions differently and wasnвҖҷt just faster. I was always excited to see how the new one worked.

I would turn off the boundary and just stand on a yoga mat in a 6x6 space. I like how it has you reach out far in your workspace. 

One thing about it is after 10 hours the voice lines start to get really repetitive. The ammount of different drinks keeps the game interesting for a lot longer though.
Iv been having crazy fun on the game but when im not connected to internet i canвҖҷt complete an order i press the green button and nothing happens how do i fix this
I have had a lot of fun on this game and have done for quite a while but I do think there should be an online mode making drinks with friends
Me and my girlfriend love it we have spent hours playing it

I was extremely depressed before discovering this game. I was fat, 4вҖҷ10 and I played genshin impact. I am now a sigma and own a yacht being 6 foot and a muscular build. Buy this and I guarantee you will see the same results
Liked it at first but then it got very repetitive, all you do is buy stuff to make it easier to get the shift done. I tried to refund it but they didn't allow it. Don't buy

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear you found it repetitive. Startenders has a fully voiced story campaign for you to enjoy, Daily Shift challenges, Endless Mode challenges, Custom Drinks and much more - we hope you get to experience these features!

reviews.review_description: The app isn't working properly, what a waste of money

developer_response.body:
Can you provide any information about what isn't working, maybe we can help! Thank you.

[Update] Just checking in to see if there is anything we can do to help?

reviews.review_description: When IвҖҷm in the tutorial, it says to press the juicer button and I do, but it doesnвҖҷt say that I do and it does nothing, IвҖҷve tried everything and nothing works.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for letting us know. Do you have any other details? Have you put a fruit into the juicer? Is there a glass in the juice slot when you have pressed the button? Feel free to reach out to us at contact@foggybox.co.uk and we can help reslove the issue.

reviews.review_description: My game not working my screen stays black  how do I fix it

developer_response.body: Hi, we'd love to help fix this issue. Do you have any further details that you could provide us with? What stage does the screen go black, does it show the developer and publisher logos? Does it get to the title logo and loading bar? Feel free to reach out to contact@foggybox.co.uk and we can assist further

reviews.review_description: Smacked myself in the face with my controller trying to flip a bottle to look cool, game is 10/10

I start my game and it works for 10 minutes then something doesn't let me continue, then I restart it and it makes me play the whole part again, then it works, I was then told to pick up an object, and it hadn't spawned in

developer_response.body:
Hi, do you have any more info on this? What item was it asking you? If you want to reach out please feel free to at contact@foggybox.co.uk

[Edit] We'd really like to help you, please send us any information about your problem to us at contact@foggybox.co.uk

developer_response.body: If you still own the game we think this might be fixed, due to a recent Meta update it caused a few crashes in the game but this is now fixed with the latest headset update. Please let us know if this fixes the game for you!

DonвҖҷt buy this. I bought it and donвҖҷt think itвҖҷs good. They didnвҖҷt refund me. 
DonвҖҷt buy. 
DonвҖҷt buy

reviews.review_description: https://www.meta.com/appreferrals/havocowo/3671539682885620/?utm_source=2 (replace meta with oculus)

picked this up on sale over the holiday weekend and to be honest, I would have paid full price for how fun this is. I don't usually like fast-paced, stressful games (worked in retail for too long lol) but once you get the hang of making drinks efficiently, multiple customers and longer recipes aren't bad. I'd recommend this game to anyone, VR beginner or vet.

There are some bugs--every once in a while the can opener falls through the counter and can't be rescued, and sometimes if you put cups too close together they go flying, but all in all this is a really smooth, fun game. I've only played the campaign, but I'm excited to try the other game modes.

developer_response.body:
[Update 30/11/22]
Glad to hear you are enjoying Startenders and thank you for the kind review!

We have just pushed a fix for small items falling through, this should stop the canister opening fallig through also. These will now update as expected.

reviews.review_description: Glitches

developer_response.body:
[Endless Update]
We have now released the endless update for Startenders which comes with lots of fixesand mroe! We hope you jump back in and see for yourself!


Hi and thanks for your review - we're sorry you are experiencing problems with Startenders, we'd like to know more about the glitches you are facing and get them looked at. Please send more details to contact@foggybox.co.uk, or join our Discord through www.joinstartedenders.com.

reviews.review_title: Impossible to play in a wheelchair
reviews.review_description: I was really looking forward to playing this game but even on short mode itвҖҷs impossible to grab a lot of stuff like the cleaning button for glasses in the tutorial. I am on a wheelchair and this got me so frustrated I quit trying at the tutorial.

developer_response.body:
[Hotfix]
We recently added a new snap turning mode for seated users "Origin" will rotate you around the centre of your play space rather than the "head" snap turning mode. I hope this helps get you back behind the barship, but please let us know if there is more we can do!

[Endless Update]
We have now released the endless update for Startenders which comes with a few changes to accessibility features. Easy Reach and a new snap turning mode better suited for seated users as well as a better height adjust system in the settings. We hope you jump back in and see for yourself!


[Update]
Hi, we've pushed a few changes to the accesbility settings menus. You can now adjust a height offset to increase or decrease to your liking. Easy Reach will allow you to reach further with less movement. Please let us know if this helps, we appreciate the feedback and what changes we can make to make Startenders playable for everyone.

Hey, thanks for this feedback. We'd hoped the Height Adjust Handles in combination with Small Mode would allow for accessible play. But from the sounds of it we need to take a closer look at Small Mode and make improvements as a priority for our next update! Would love to hear your thoughts and what we can do to improve the experience for you. Reach out to contact@foggybox.co.uk or join our discord.

reviews.review_description:
Well this is a just a blast and would highly recommend.  Couple recommendations for the developer:

1) I would make an endless mode
2) I would make it easier to find out more about ingredients maybe a tooltip or something
Love the game. Super fun
As the title says, itвҖҳs currently my favorite vr game, but I gave it 4 stars, because right now it crashes in every shift, but Im sure IвҖҳll get a solution from the amazing dev. team soon!

Really fun game! However, as someone who's 5' 6", it was a lot easier to play it standing instead of sitting. When I was sitting, I was constantly finagling with the counter height to get it in a good spot. "Easy reach" fixed the issue, but overall I definitely enjoyed it more when I was standing and using the normal reach.
Overall, though, I'm glad the developer included a lot of options to get positioning right

I absolutely love playing this game daily for the daily shift as well as the endless mode. The only problem I have is I can not for the life of me figure out how to use the nootjuice and itвҖҷs not included in the tutorials. I do wish there was a bit more guidance but really do love this game for daily play.

developer_response.body: We are looking at ways for players to still discover the new ingredients but give them guidance too, the noot needs to be fed with the correct fruit then squeezed by pressing the trigger! Thank you for the review!

reviews.review_description:
Startenders is amazingly engaging and ramps up at a pace that is manageable and fun. The atmosphere keeps you hopping about different stations to serve customers and teaches you the basics very well. Once you know the gist you'll be tossing drinks and collecting tips with no effort. The world is interesting and the tools are endlessly fun to play with.

If you're coaching another player through an experience though, this is not the game for you, compatability issues with casting often result in a black screen or no connectivity at all. 

That being said you won't find a better bar service/Sci fi title that scratches the itch you would want in such a title.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback! Sorry to hear you are having issues with your casting. You may want to reach out to Meta support and see if they can help resolve the issue, unfortunately we have no control over this feature. We look forward to you enjoying Startenders in future.

Feel free to reach out to us via contact@foggybox.co.uk or join our discord via joinstartenders.com

reviews.review_description: This game is the best if you want to be an intergalactic bartender! Simply because of the physics of the booze and how fun it is! ItвҖҷs campaign is also great. I would recommend this game to a friend for how fun it is! The best part is you can go one on one against someone wether they be random or one of your friends in who can serve as many drinks as possible in a certain amount of time. You can also make your own special drinks for the Ai to order it can be as simple as one item or as difficult as 10 items combined together. So overall this game is worth if your trying to have fun alone or with a friend or maybe just want to play something sort of relaxing.
Its a really fun game with plenty of mini-games and achievements to get. The amount of drinks you can make is crazy

This game is overall fun. You get to bartend in space. The characters are fun and the drink-making is also a joy. The reason for taking away one star is the difficulty level. It's too difficult to please your customers from the first level. They expect you to mix the drinks really quickly when you're barely familiar with the ingredients - even if you've passed the tutorial. So, I'm doing my best and working as fast as I can, but most of my customers leave mad, even on stage 1. Besides that, the characters (so far) seem repetitive. You're seeing the same faces in different outfits. Hopefully I will get more 'addicted' soon :)

developer_response.body:
[Endless Update]
We have now released the endless update for Startenders which comes with a casual mode for non rushed gameplay, we have also made tweaks to customer timings. We hope you jump back in and see for yourself!


[Hotfix 3]
We have pushed an update which gives a much smoother progression curve to the game and should stop the difficulty spikes straight away as you mentioned in your review. I hope you try it again and feel free to leave more feedback!

Thanks for the positive review and the feedback!

reviews.review_description:
The cooking game genre isn't original, and this game is at its core a cooking game, but it's also a lot more. It's like the developers said, what if we did a cooking game ... but changed everything? Instead of burgers, you're mixing drinks ... but nothing you'd actually recognize. I really felt like I was bartending in one of those sci-fi movies.

I'm not into mixology at all so I was worried I wouldn't enjoy this game, but I *love* it! It really makes me smile and there are tons of little touches that shows the developers went the extra mile for something a little different from the rest. Making your own concoction and later having customers actually order it, that's cute. Instead of pressing a button to upgrade, you actually buy the blueprint and then have to build it from parts. Talk about immersion!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! If you find Tim, please tell him to come home - The Academy is getting worried!

reviews.review_description:
Similar to most order fulfillment games except you get to make weird drinks.

Fun:
* Making drinks and using the different processes.
* Buying new things and new machines is satisfying
* Fun story
* Local multiplayer seems cool (haven't played)

Issues:
* Sometimes grabbing things seem awkward or don't register (garnish bar)
* Upgrades of devices and items make it harder to use - not really an incentive to buy
* New items have specific ways to use them without descriptions
* Things you buy stay in the store - don't check off
* Some of the warping in the base defaults to a specific direction

Tldr; for the cost it is entertaining and some that you can replay - may be good for party play.

developer_response.body:
[Endless Update]
We have now released the endless update for Startenders which comes with lots of fixes to what you have mentioned, including an overhauled store and auto rotation on/off in the settings menu! We hope you jump back in and see for yourself!

reviews.review_title: Good game but there is a problem
reviews.review_description: The game is very addicting and feels good to play, i didn't regret buying it. On the other hand, the game won't start (at least for me) if the oculus headset is not connected to the internet despite the description saying it doesn't need an internet connection to play. Please fix this issue in a future update.

developer_response.body:
[Hotfix]
Thanks for the review and the bug report! We have just pushed a hotfix to stop this from happening and you should now be able to launch the game without internet connection. Feel free to reach out to us via contact@foggybox.co.uk or join our discord via joinstartenders.com for any new reports or feedback
